mapper.select:
SELECT l.id, l.admin_id AS adminId, u.nickname AS adminName, l.action_type AS actionType, l.target_type AS targetType, l.target_id AS targetId, l.description, l.action_detail AS actionDetail, l.ip_address AS ipAddress, l.created_at AS createdAt FROM tb_admin_log l LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON l.admin_id = u.id
AND (l.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%'))
AND l.action_type = #{dto.actionType}
AND l.target_type = #{dto.targetType}
ORDER BY
l.action_type l.target_type l.created_at
ASC DESC
